notes: Promotion includes ModernUI static style/gamepad sheets at 16x16, 32x32, and 48x48 plus trash-button animation GIFs.
The files are unsliced source sheets/animations and remain deferred until atlas slice, nine-patch, and control-state metadata exists.
The broader SRC-014 drop is handled separately: BND-010 promotes the ModernUI portrait generator, and the extracted CuteSCKR/Human archive payloads are catalog-normalized for local library use.
